target_categories.name: Brain
target_categories.description: Neuroscience, brain anatomy, neural circuits, learning, memory, and how the nervous system processes signals and adapts structure.

target_categories.name: Biology
target_categories.description: Cellular biology, genetics, evolution, physiology, immunology, and how living systems function and adapt.

target_categories.name: Ecology
target_categories.description: Ecosystems, species interactions, invasive species, environmental adaptation, and how organisms shape and respond to their habitats.

target_categories.name: Trade
target_categories.description: International trade, tariffs, supply chains, commodity markets, chokepoints, cartels, and the economics of global commerce.

target_categories.name: Infrastructure
target_categories.description: Critical systems including transportation, utilities, data centers, cybersecurity, and the challenges of maintaining and modernizing essential networks.

target_categories.name: Governance
target_categories.description: Policy design, lawmaking, elections, legitimacy, institutional accountability, and how governments structure authority and outcomes.

target_categories.name: Justice
target_categories.description: Law enforcement, criminal justice, punishment, execution methods, institutional failure in policing and corrections.

target_categories.name: Business
target_categories.description: Corporate strategy, business models, market competition, disruption, and how companies adapt to technological and economic change.

target_categories.name: Medicine
target_categories.description: Diagnosis, treatment, medical systems, end-of-life care, and how healthcare makes decisions under uncertainty.

target_categories.name: Science
target_categories.description: Scientific discovery, research methods, fossil records, astronomy, physics, paleontology, and basic research findings across disciplines.
